title: Pallet Shrink Wrap Stretch Film - Heavy Duty Industrial Film 400mm x 300m x 23 Micron Clear Cling Packaging Plastic Wraping Roll for Luggage Moving Furniture Protect Strong Packing Parcel - Pack of 1

It is Made of High-Quality Polyethene Full Resistant with Moisture Proof Properties For Wrapping And Protecting Goods In Transit
Heavy Duty Cling Film - Great For Wrapping Pallets, Moving House, Industrial Storage And Wrapping baggage ,Suitcase , Sofa , Moving House
Handy Wrap Roll Easy to Use - No Need for Additional Tape or Heat Sealing Securing Objects Equipment Boxes for Transport

description: Product Description Pallet Wrap 23 Micron Film Thick Multi-Use Strong Pallet Stretch Wrap Our Pallet Stretch Shrink Wrap is designed to provide exceptional strength and durability for all your packaging needs. Designed for multiple use Great for luggage wrapping. Great for wrapping suitcases. Great for wrapping awkward and bulky items. Strong and clings well.
